title: Null pointer check in a wrong place in array locator method

features.name: queue find with lambda accessing class method
features.description: Code should include a queue find() operation with a lambda expression that accesses a class method via item.get_i() pattern

features.name: array locator with class object and method call
features.description: Code should include an array locator method operating on a queue of class objects where the with clause calls a method on the item

features.name: queue with with_clause accessing class method
features.description: Code should include a queue of class objects accessed via a with clause that invokes a class member function
